content: The Battle of Waterloo took place in the year 1815.
raw_content: The Battle of Waterloo took place in the year 1815.
reasoning: Okay, so I need to figure out the year the Battle of Waterloo took place. I remember that it was a significant battle in European history, involving Napoleon. I think it happened in the early 19th century, but I'm not exactly sure of the exact year. I recall that it was after Napoleon's escape from exile, maybe around 1815. Wait, was it before or after the Hundred Days period? I think the Hundred Days refers to the time when Napoleon returned to power before being defeated. So the Battle of Waterloo would be the end of that period. I believe it's in June 1815. Let me double-check. Yes, I'm pretty sure it was June 18, 1815, when the battle occurred. That makes the year 1815.
